verified: All figures verified against IRAS, MAS, HDB & CPF on 14 Jun 2026. Singapore Budget 2026 made no housing-policy changes. Most recent change: Seller's Stamp Duty revision, 4 Jul 2025.
disclaimer: Indicative only, Caveat drafts, the agent verifies. Not financial advice; final duties and eligibility are determined by IRAS, MAS, HDB and the buyer's bank.

absd.note: Effective 27 Apr 2023. Rate applies to the higher of price or market value.
absd.fta_note: Under FTAs, nationals of the USA and nationals & PRs of Iceland, Liechtenstein, Norway and Switzerland are taxed at SC rates. Remission is not automatic, it must be applied for.
absd.married_refund_note: First-timer SC married couples may claim full ABSD refund on a 2nd property if the first is sold within 6 months of purchase (completed property), no extension.

bsd.note: Buyer's Stamp Duty, residential, effective 15 Feb 2023.

ssd.note: Seller's Stamp Duty, residential. The 16/12/8/4 table applies ONLY to property purchased on/after 4 Jul 2025. HDB flats are unaffected (MOP prevents early sale).

grandfathered_pre_2025_07_04.note: For property purchased 11 Mar 2017, 3 Jul 2025: 3-year holding period.

ltv.reduced_note: Reduced LTV applies if loan tenure exceeds 30yr (private) / 25yr (HDB), or the loan extends beyond the borrower's age of 65.

hdb.income_ceiling_note: Ceilings apply to new flats (BTO/SBF) and to taking an HDB loan or grants. Buying a resale flat outright (cash/bank loan, no grant) has no income ceiling. The $7,000 single ceiling is for the 2-room Flexi / Single Singapore Citizen Scheme.
hdb.grants_note: Enhanced CPF Housing Grant (EHG): up to $120k families / $60k singles, tiered by income. Resale CPF Housing Grant (family): $80k for 4-room or smaller, $50k for 5-room or larger (singles get half: $40k / $25k). Proximity Housing Grant (PHG, no income ceiling): families $30k (living with parents/child) or $20k (within 4km); singles $15k (with) or $10k (near). All subject to eligibility.
hdb.eip_note: Ethnic Integration Policy + SPR quotas apply at block and neighbourhood level, verify live on HDB's EIP/SPR e-Service before committing.

hdb_resale: Intent to Sell (>=7 days before OTP)
Request for Value ($120, next working day)
private_resale: BSD + ABSD within 14 days of execution
